title: hieracium cerinthoides subsp. neochlorum
intro: Hieracium cerinthoides subsp. neochlorum, a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, is a plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to certain regions of Europe. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium cerinthoides subsp. neochlorum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
